General.Name: Playside Studios Ltd
General.Description: PlaySide Studios Limited develops and sells mobile, PC, and console video games in Australia. It also offers virtual reality games. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Port Melbourne, Australia.
General.Address: 75 Crockford Street, Port Melbourne, VIC, Australia, 3207
